_doc: Starter scene so the game BOOTS + plays + LOOKS like a level immediately after scaffold (live preview works before the agent authors art). Asset-free on purpose: `platforms` are drawn as solid blocks (no tile sprite needed), `colliders` are the physics (linked to platforms by id), `background` is a flat sky color. The agent replaces/extends this per spec — keep at least one level whose id matches GAME.startScene.
name: Border Road
